name: normalizeProjectId produces same slug as buildProjectId for human-readable names (B1 fix — PHASE-16 UNIFIED)
description: RED (before B1 fix): normalizeProjectId('New NT') trims only → 'New NT' ≠ 'new_nt' → slugs_match=false → FAIL. GREEN (after B1 fix): normalizeProjectId applies lowercase+slug → 'new_nt' === buildProjectId output → both assertions true → PASS.
